_meta.description: Transcripts emocionalmente neutros para extraer principal components (PCA) que capturen confounds no-emocionales del residual stream (estilo, longitud, formato, registro tecnico). Estas PCs se proyectan FUERA de los probes de emocion en F1.2, para aislar la direccion emocional pura. Basado en Lindsey/Sofroniew et al. 2026 seccion 3.2.
_meta.usage: Usar con extract_171_probes() → compute_neutral_pcs(variance_cover=0.50). Las PCs que expliquen hasta 50% de varianza acumulada se restan de cada probe_raw.
_meta.anti_leak_rule: Sin palabras emocionales (feliz, triste, miedo, angry, love, etc.). Contenido: codigo, matematicas, instrucciones tecnicas, tablas, APIs, definiciones, procedimientos, formatos.

transcripts: A for loop in Python iterates over a sequence such as a list, tuple, or string. The syntax is: for item in iterable: followed by an indented block of statements. The range() function is commonly used to generate a sequence of numbers. Example: for i in range(5) iterates from 0 to 4.

The quadratic formula solves equations of the form ax squared plus bx plus c equals zero. The solutions are x equals negative b plus or minus the square root of b squared minus four a c, divided by two a. The discriminant b squared minus 4ac determines the number of real roots.

To install a Python package, use pip install followed by the package name. You may optionally specify a version constraint with double equals, greater than, or less than. Requirements files list dependencies one per line and are installed with pip install dash r requirements dot txt.

HTTP status codes in the 200 range indicate success. 404 indicates a resource was not found. 500 indicates an internal server error. 301 indicates a permanent redirect. 401 indicates authentication is required. 403 indicates access is forbidden even with authentication.

A binary tree is a data structure where each node has at most two children, referred to as left and right. A balanced binary search tree maintains the invariant that for every node, values in the left subtree are smaller and values in the right subtree are larger.

The function F(n) returns the nth Fibonacci number. Base cases: F(0) equals 0 and F(1) equals 1. Recursive case: F(n) equals F(n-1) plus F(n-2). An iterative implementation runs in linear time and constant space.

JSON is a lightweight data interchange format. Objects are enclosed in curly braces and contain key colon value pairs separated by commas. Arrays are enclosed in square brackets. Strings use double quotes. Numbers have no quotes. Booleans are true or false. Null represents the absence of value.

A database index is a data structure that improves the speed of data retrieval operations at the cost of additional storage and slower writes. B-tree indexes are common for equality and range queries. Hash indexes support equality lookups only. Bitmap indexes suit low-cardinality columns.

The matrix product C equals A times B is defined when the number of columns of A equals the number of rows of B. Element C sub i j equals the sum over k of A sub i k times B sub k j. Matrix multiplication is associative but not commutative.

CSS selectors target HTML elements for styling. A class selector is prefixed with a period. An id selector is prefixed with a hash symbol. The descendant combinator is whitespace between two selectors. The child combinator is a greater than sign.

A REST API exposes resources over HTTP. GET retrieves, POST creates, PUT replaces, PATCH updates partially, and DELETE removes. Responses typically include a status code and a JSON body. Headers convey metadata such as media type and authentication tokens.

Boolean algebra operates on two values: 0 and 1. The AND operation returns 1 only when both inputs are 1. OR returns 1 if any input is 1. NOT inverts the value. XOR returns 1 when inputs differ. De Morgan's laws relate negation of AND to OR of negations.

A Docker container is an isolated process running on a host. The image contains the filesystem and metadata. Dockerfiles describe how to build images. Layers are cached and reused. Volumes provide persistent storage independent of the container lifecycle.

The derivative of a polynomial term a times x to the n is n times a times x to the n minus 1. The derivative of a sum is the sum of derivatives. The product rule states d over d x of f times g equals f prime g plus f g prime.

Git is a distributed version control system. The staging area holds changes before commit. HEAD points to the current branch tip. Branches are lightweight pointers. A merge combines divergent histories. A rebase replays commits onto a new base.

Table of exchange rates. Column 1: currency code. Column 2: rate against USD. Row 1: EUR 0.92. Row 2: GBP 0.78. Row 3: JPY 149.30. Row 4: CNY 7.24. Row 5: CAD 1.36. Row 6: AUD 1.52. Row 7: CHF 0.88. Row 8: INR 83.12.

A pointer stores the memory address of a value. Dereferencing accesses the value at that address. A null pointer references no valid object. Pointer arithmetic advances by multiples of the referenced type's size. Double pointers reference pointers.

The Pythagorean theorem states that in a right triangle, the square of the length of the hypotenuse equals the sum of the squares of the lengths of the other two sides. Algebraically: a squared plus b squared equals c squared, where c is the hypotenuse.

Kubernetes orchestrates containers across a cluster. Pods are the smallest deployable units. Services expose pods to network traffic. Deployments manage replica sets and rolling updates. ConfigMaps and Secrets inject configuration. Persistent Volumes provide storage.

A regular expression is a sequence of characters that defines a search pattern. The dot matches any single character. The asterisk matches zero or more of the preceding element. The plus matches one or more. Brackets define character classes. The caret anchors to the start.

Assembly language provides a near direct mapping to machine instructions. MOV transfers data between registers or memory. ADD performs addition. JMP transfers control. CMP compares values and sets flags. LOAD and STORE access memory. Registers are named AX, BX, CX, and so on.

The Fourier transform decomposes a function of time into frequencies. The continuous transform integrates the product of the signal and a complex exponential over all time. The inverse transform reconstructs the signal. The discrete version operates on sampled data.

A hash function maps arbitrary input to fixed-size output. Cryptographic hash functions are one-way, collision-resistant, and deterministic. Common algorithms include SHA-256, SHA-3, and BLAKE2. Non-cryptographic hashes like MurmurHash prioritize speed over security.

In relational algebra, selection filters rows based on a predicate. Projection restricts to a subset of columns. Join combines rows from two relations by a common attribute. Union concatenates relations with identical schema. Difference removes common rows.

The speed of light in vacuum is approximately 299,792,458 meters per second. Planck's constant is approximately 6.626 times 10 to the negative 34 joule seconds. The gravitational constant is approximately 6.674 times 10 to the negative 11 cubic meters per kilogram second squared.

A linked list is a linear data structure where each element points to the next. Singly linked lists have one pointer per node. Doubly linked lists have forward and backward pointers. Insertion at the head is constant time. Access by index is linear time.

TCP provides reliable ordered delivery of a stream of bytes. The three-way handshake establishes a connection: SYN, SYN ACK, ACK. Flow control uses a sliding window. Congestion control adjusts the rate based on observed loss. Termination uses FIN and ACK exchanges.

A transformer architecture uses self-attention layers followed by feed-forward layers. Each token attends to all other tokens. Queries, keys, and values are linear projections of the input. Multi-head attention runs several attentions in parallel and concatenates outputs.

Schedule of daily tasks. 09:00 stand-up meeting. 09:30 code review queue. 11:00 implementation block. 13:00 lunch. 14:00 focus block. 16:00 integration tests. 17:00 metrics review. 17:30 write daily log. 18:00 close laptop.

In calculus, a limit describes the value a function approaches as the input approaches some value. Formally, the limit of f(x) as x approaches a is L if for every epsilon greater than zero there exists a delta greater than zero such that the absolute value of f(x) minus L is less than epsilon whenever the absolute value of x minus a is less than delta and greater than zero.

A list comprehension in Python produces a new list by applying an expression to each element of an iterable, optionally filtered by a condition. Syntax: brackets enclosing expression, for clause, zero or more for or if clauses. Example: squares equals bracket x times x for x in range 10.

The OSI model has seven layers. Layer 1 is physical. Layer 2 is data link. Layer 3 is network. Layer 4 is transport. Layer 5 is session. Layer 6 is presentation. Layer 7 is application. Each layer provides services to the layer above using services of the layer below.

A priority queue returns elements in order of priority rather than insertion. Binary heaps provide logarithmic insert and extract-min. Fibonacci heaps improve decrease-key to amortized constant time. Indexed priority queues support random access by key.

The SQL statement SELECT column FROM table retrieves data. WHERE filters rows. GROUP BY aggregates. HAVING filters groups. ORDER BY sorts. LIMIT caps the result count. JOIN combines tables. INSERT adds rows. UPDATE modifies rows. DELETE removes rows.

Ohm's law states that voltage equals current times resistance. Power equals voltage times current. Kirchhoff's voltage law: the sum of voltages around any closed loop is zero. Kirchhoff's current law: the sum of currents entering a node equals the sum leaving.

A finite state machine consists of states, an alphabet, a transition function, a start state, and a set of accepting states. Deterministic finite automata accept regular languages. Nondeterministic finite automata accept the same class but with possible transitions per input.

Recipe for flatbread. Combine 300 grams of flour, 180 grams of water, 5 grams of salt, 3 grams of yeast. Knead 8 minutes. Rest 1 hour. Divide into 6 portions. Roll each to 3 millimeter thickness. Cook in a hot pan 90 seconds per side. Yields 6 flatbreads.

A thread is the smallest unit of execution scheduled by an operating system. Threads within a process share memory. Context switching saves and restores register state. A mutex enforces exclusive access. A semaphore limits access to N concurrent holders.

The sigmoid function maps real numbers to the interval between zero and one. Formula: sigma of x equals 1 over 1 plus e to the negative x. Its derivative equals sigma of x times 1 minus sigma of x. Used historically as an activation function in neural networks.

A CPU cache sits between registers and main memory. L1 is smallest and fastest. L2 is larger and slower. L3 is largest and slowest among caches. Cache hits avoid main memory access. Cache lines typically hold 64 bytes. Spatial and temporal locality govern effectiveness.

Base 2 numbers use digits 0 and 1. Base 10 is decimal. Base 16 is hexadecimal, using 0 through 9 and A through F. To convert decimal to binary, repeatedly divide by 2 and record remainders. To convert binary to decimal, sum powers of 2 for each set bit.

A chess board has 8 rows and 8 columns. Files are labeled a through h. Ranks are labeled 1 through 8. Each player begins with 16 pieces: 8 pawns, 2 knights, 2 bishops, 2 rooks, 1 queen, 1 king. Pawns may move forward one square, or two from the starting rank.

Gradient descent minimizes a function by moving in the direction of steepest descent. Update rule: theta becomes theta minus alpha times gradient of J at theta. Alpha is the learning rate. Convergence depends on the learning rate, the curvature, and starting point.

A compiler translates source code into machine code. Stages include lexical analysis, parsing, semantic analysis, intermediate representation, optimization, and code generation. An interpreter executes source directly. A just-in-time compiler combines approaches at runtime.

Dimensional analysis checks equation consistency. Force has dimensions of mass times length divided by time squared. Energy has dimensions of mass times length squared divided by time squared. Power is energy per unit time. Pressure is force per unit area.

HTML elements have opening and closing tags. Attributes appear in opening tags as name equals quoted value. Block elements start on new lines. Inline elements flow in text. Semantic elements include header, nav, main, article, section, aside, and footer.

A stack is a last-in first-out data structure. Push adds an element to the top. Pop removes and returns the top element. Peek returns the top without removal. Used for function call frames, expression evaluation, undo operations, and depth-first search.

The Taylor series of f at a is the sum over n from 0 to infinity of f to the n of a divided by n factorial, times x minus a to the n. The Maclaurin series is the Taylor series at zero. Common Maclaurin series include exponential, sine, and cosine.

A graph consists of vertices and edges. Directed graphs have ordered pairs as edges. Undirected graphs have unordered pairs. A path is a sequence of edges connecting vertices. A cycle is a path that starts and ends at the same vertex. Trees are connected acyclic graphs.

UTF-8 encodes Unicode code points in one to four bytes. ASCII characters use one byte. European accented characters use two. Most common Asian characters use three. Supplementary plane characters use four. The encoding is self-synchronizing.

Linear regression fits a line y equals m x plus b to data. Ordinary least squares minimizes the sum of squared residuals. The closed form solution gives the slope as the covariance of x and y divided by the variance of x. The intercept adjusts to pass through the means.

A B-tree of order m has at most m children per node and at least ceiling of m over 2 children except the root. Keys within a node are sorted. Searches descend following key boundaries. Inserts split full nodes. Deletes may merge underfull nodes. Used in databases and filesystems.

Supply schedule. Item A: 200 units, delivery Tuesday. Item B: 150 units, delivery Wednesday. Item C: 300 units, delivery Thursday. Item D: 75 units, delivery Friday. Item E: 50 units, delivery Friday. Truck capacity 800 units. Total load 775 units.

Polymorphism allows a single interface to refer to different implementations. Subtype polymorphism uses inheritance and method overriding. Parametric polymorphism uses generics. Ad-hoc polymorphism uses function overloading. Duck typing relies on runtime protocol compatibility.

The gamma function extends the factorial to real and complex numbers. For positive integers, gamma of n equals n minus 1 factorial. It obeys the identity gamma of x plus 1 equals x times gamma of x. Gamma of one half equals the square root of pi.

YAML is a human-readable data serialization format. Indentation denotes structure. Lists begin with a dash. Key value pairs use a colon. Strings may be quoted or unquoted. Anchors and aliases allow reuse. Multiline strings use pipe or greater than markers.

A raycaster projects rays from a viewpoint into a scene and finds the first intersection with geometry. Distance to the intersection determines perceived size. Shading depends on surface normal and light direction. Recursive rays handle reflection and refraction.

Newton's method finds roots of f by iterating x becomes x minus f of x divided by f prime of x. Quadratic convergence holds near simple roots when f prime is nonzero. Initial guess matters. Failure modes include cycling and divergence.

A heap is a complete binary tree satisfying the heap property. In a max-heap, each parent is greater than or equal to its children. In a min-heap, each parent is less than or equal. Heapify costs linear time. Insert and extract cost logarithmic time.

Distance between New York and London is about 5585 kilometers. Distance between Tokyo and Singapore is about 5321 kilometers. Distance between Paris and Moscow is about 2486 kilometers. Distance between Sydney and Los Angeles is about 12070 kilometers.

Spring boot is a framework for building Java applications with minimal configuration. Annotations declare beans, controllers, and services. Dependency injection wires components. Properties files configure behavior. Actuators expose metrics and health endpoints.

Integration by parts uses the identity: integral of u d v equals u v minus integral of v d u. Choose u to simplify upon differentiation and d v to be easy to integrate. Common mnemonic: LIATE for logarithmic, inverse trig, algebraic, trig, exponential priority.

A red-black tree is a self-balancing binary search tree. Every node is red or black. The root is black. Red nodes have black children. Every path from a node to its descendant leaves contains the same number of black nodes. These invariants bound height logarithmically.

A vertex shader transforms vertex positions and passes attributes to fragment shaders. A fragment shader computes the color of each pixel. Uniform variables are set per draw call. Attributes are set per vertex. Varyings interpolate across primitives.

An inductive proof has two parts. The base case establishes the statement for the smallest value. The inductive step shows that if the statement holds for n, it holds for n plus 1. Together these imply the statement for all natural numbers at or above the base.

The k-means algorithm partitions data into k clusters. Initialize k centroids. Repeat: assign each point to the nearest centroid, then recompute each centroid as the mean of its assigned points. Iterate until assignments stabilize. Result depends on initialization.

A web socket provides full-duplex communication over a single TCP connection. The handshake upgrades an HTTP request. After upgrade, either side may send messages. Frames have a small header and a payload. Used for chat, collaborative editing, and live dashboards.

The logarithm is the inverse of exponentiation. Log base b of x equals y means b to the y equals x. Common identities: log of a times b equals log a plus log b. Log of a to the n equals n times log a. Change of base: log base b of x equals log x divided by log b.

An N-dimensional numeric array can have rank zero (scalar), rank one (vector), or rank two (matrix). Higher ranks appear in deep learning workloads. Standard operations include addition, element-wise product, contraction along an axis, and reshaping with a compatible total size.

Dijkstra's algorithm finds shortest paths from a source to all vertices in a graph with non-negative weights. Maintain a priority queue of distances. Extract the minimum, update its outgoing edges, repeat. Runs in E log V time with a binary heap.

A futures contract obligates the buyer to purchase an asset at a set price on a future date. Margin requirements reduce counterparty risk. Daily mark to market settles gains and losses. Contracts may be cash-settled or physically settled.

Object oriented programming organizes code around objects. A class defines attributes and methods. Instances share method code and hold individual state. Encapsulation hides internal details. Inheritance extends classes. Composition combines objects as fields.

A differential equation relates a function to its derivatives. A linear first-order equation has the form y prime plus p of x times y equals q of x. An integrating factor e to the integral of p of x reduces it to an exact differential.

Apache Kafka is a distributed event streaming platform. Producers publish to topics. Consumers subscribe and read at their own pace. Partitions allow parallelism. Replication provides durability. Offsets track consumer position. Retention policies define how long events persist.

A median is the middle value of a sorted list. For an even number of values, it is the average of the two middle values. The median is robust to outliers. The quartiles divide sorted data into four parts. The interquartile range measures spread.

A linker combines object files into a single executable. Symbols are resolved across files. Relocations adjust addresses. Static linking embeds libraries in the executable. Dynamic linking resolves at load or run time. Linkers produce position independent code when requested.

The ideal gas law states P times V equals n times R times T. P is pressure, V is volume, n is moles, R is the gas constant, T is temperature in kelvin. Derivable from kinetic theory under assumptions of small particle size and elastic collisions.

A protocol buffer schema defines message types and fields. Each field has a name, type, and tag number. Code generators produce serializers in many languages. Encoded messages are compact and forward-compatible when fields are added with new tags.

The transpose of a matrix swaps rows and columns. Notation: A with superscript T. Transpose of a product reverses order: A B all transposed equals B transposed times A transposed. A matrix equals its transpose if and only if it is symmetric.

A circuit breaker pattern prevents cascading failures. It tracks error rates to a downstream service. When errors exceed a threshold, the breaker opens and short circuits further calls for a cooldown window. After the cooldown, it probes with a test request.

In probability, an event is a subset of outcomes. The probability of an event is a number between zero and one. Conditional probability of A given B equals probability of A and B divided by probability of B. Bayes' rule relates conditional probabilities.

A Makefile defines targets, dependencies, and recipes. Make invokes a recipe when its target is older than any dependency. Variables are assigned with equals. Pattern rules use percent signs. Phony targets do not correspond to files.

Sorting algorithms include bubble, insertion, selection, merge, quick, heap, and radix. Comparison sorts are bounded below by n log n. Radix sort is linear for fixed-width keys. Stability preserves the order of equal elements. In-place sorts use constant extra memory.

A continuous random variable has a probability density function. The probability that it takes any specific value is zero. Probabilities are computed over intervals as integrals of the density. The cumulative distribution function gives the probability of values at or below a threshold.

ARIA attributes improve accessibility by conveying roles, states, and properties to assistive technology. Role identifies the type of component. Label describes purpose. Live regions announce updates. Focus management moves keyboard attention for screen reader users.

Jupyter notebooks interleave code, text, and output. Cells run in order but may be re-executed out of order. Magics prefixed with percent signs configure behavior. Kernels execute code in a language. The file format stores cells, outputs, and metadata as JSON.

The chain rule differentiates a composition. If h of x equals f of g of x then h prime of x equals f prime of g of x times g prime of x. Generalizes to multiple variables with Jacobian matrices. Underlies backpropagation in neural networks.

A UUID is a 128-bit identifier. Version 1 encodes time and node. Version 4 is random. Version 5 hashes a namespace and name. The canonical string form is 32 hexadecimal digits in five groups separated by hyphens. Collisions are practically impossible for v4.

A pivot table summarizes data by grouping and aggregating. Rows and columns define groupings. Values hold aggregates such as sum, count, or average. Filters restrict the source rows. Drilling reveals underlying detail.

Inventory report. SKU A001 quantity 142. SKU A002 quantity 88. SKU A003 quantity 231. SKU A004 quantity 17. SKU A005 quantity 305. SKU A006 quantity 94. SKU A007 quantity 62. SKU A008 quantity 178. Total lines 8. Total quantity 1117.

A bloom filter is a probabilistic set membership structure. k hash functions map items to bits in a bit array. Membership tests may return false positives but never false negatives. Space use scales with expected items and desired false positive rate.

The Laplace transform maps a function of time to a function of a complex variable. F of s equals the integral from zero to infinity of e to the negative s t times f of t d t. Useful for solving linear differential equations with initial conditions.

A CDN caches static assets at edge locations close to users. Requests are served from the nearest edge. Origin servers handle cache misses and dynamic payloads. Cache invalidation can be time-based, tag-based, or explicit. Reduces latency and origin load.

Vectors add componentwise. The dot product of two vectors is the sum of products of corresponding components. The cross product in three dimensions produces a vector perpendicular to both, with magnitude equal to the product of magnitudes times the sine of the included angle.

Entry in the system log. Timestamp 2026-01-14T09:31:07Z. Level INFO. Module ingest. Message batch processed 2048 records. Duration 134 ms. Memory peak 312 megabytes. Partition key p17. Next batch scheduled in 60 seconds.

A checksum verifies data integrity. CRC32 is a cyclic redundancy check commonly used in network protocols and file formats. Adler-32 is faster but weaker. Cryptographic checksums such as SHA-256 also detect intentional tampering. Checksum mismatches trigger retransmission or error.

A Kalman filter estimates the state of a linear dynamic system from noisy measurements. Predict step projects state and covariance forward using the system model. Update step blends prediction with measurement using the Kalman gain. Assumes Gaussian noise.

The halting problem asks whether an arbitrary program halts on a given input. Turing proved it is undecidable. No algorithm exists that correctly decides halting for every program-input pair. Specific classes of programs may be decidable individually.

A capacitor stores electrical energy in an electric field. Capacitance C equals charge Q divided by voltage V. Units are farads. Capacitors in parallel add. Capacitors in series combine as reciprocal of sum of reciprocals. Common applications include filtering and timing.

A shader loop samples neighboring pixels to compute a blur. Gaussian weights give a smooth falloff. Separable kernels reduce work by applying horizontal and vertical passes. The radius controls strength. Sampling at half-pixel offsets uses bilinear filtering to double effective taps.
